title: Arkanian energy shield
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Arkanianshield.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Canderous Ordo]] protected by an Arkanian energy shield]]
An '''[[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] [[Personal energy shield/Legends|energy shield]]''' was a small, forearm-mounted unit designed to offer more protection than regular body armor. This particular forearm shield unit afforded the wearer protection against temperature extremes, namely heat and cold, as well as energy- and sonic-based weaponry. The unit's [[Energy cell/Legends|power cell]] could burnout from the stress of absorbing damage or from excessive use. Such a burnout required that the entire unit be replaced.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
